page: Microsoft Azure HB368-144rs_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the HBv5 server family. It features 144 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 448.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 3.11 GB per core.

This server type includes 15,851 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable. Additionally, the HB368-144rs_v5 is RDMA (Remote Direct Memory Access) capable, supporting high-throughput, low-latency networking interfaces. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high dedicated core count, substantial local storage capacity, and RDMA capabilities, the HB368-144rs_v5 is structured for high-performance computing (HPC) workloads, large-scale simulations, and data-intensive processing. The resource density of 144 dedicated cores and over 15 TB of local storage provides a specialized hardware profile for parallel computing tasks where network and storage throughput are critical, offering qualitative cost efficiency for clustered or multi-node deployments.
description: Microsoft Azure HB368-144rs_v5 is an x86_64 server instance within the HBv5 family, designed for high-performance computing. It features 144 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 448.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.11 GB per core. For storage, it includes 15,851 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. The server is RDMA capable, enabling low-latency, high-bandwidth networking, though it does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware configuration is optimized for compute-intensive workloads, large-scale parallel simulations, and clustered database operations that require high core density and substantial local storage capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure HB368-144rs_v5 is an x86_64 server with 144 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 448 GB RAM, 15,851 GB local storage, and RDMA capability, optimized for high-performance computing workloads.

tagline: A high-core-density x86_64 platform featuring dedicated processors, RDMA networking, and extensive local storage for parallel computing workloads.
